title: draba ancashensis
intro: Draba ancashensis, a perennial plant species, belongs to the Brassicaceae family and is commonly found in the Andes Mountains of Peru. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Draba ancashensis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and soothe sore throats. Herbal preparations of Draba ancashensis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
